title: Creamy Parmesan Pasta with a Crispy Crunch
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of this comforting pasta dish, featuring a molten parmesan sauce and a satisfying crunch from charred breadcrumbs.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Melt 2 tbsp of butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add parmesan cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Stir in dried basil and season with salt.
Add remaining 2 tbsp of butter to saucepan and stir until well combined.
Toss cooked pasta in sauce until well coated.
Transfer pasta to a serving dish.
Sprinkle charred breadcrumbs on top of pasta.
